activities_projects.title: Natural vs Man-made Wonders Sorting
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between natural and man-made wonders
steps: Observe the pictures of different wonders given in the textbook
Identify whether each wonder is natural or man-made
Write the answers in your notebook under two headings
Discuss your answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to classify wonders of the world based on their origin
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Nature’s Power Word Web
activities_projects.objective: Explore ideas associated with nature’s strength and beauty
steps: Write the phrase 'Nature’s Power' in the center of a web diagram
Add words or phrases related to nature such as mountains, rivers, storms, forests
Connect them to the central idea
Share your web diagram with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop vocabulary and conceptual understanding about nature
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and relevance of words used (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring the Valley of Flowers
activities_projects.objective: Learn about one of India's famous natural wonders
steps: Read the section about the Valley of Flowers
List at least five types of flowers mentioned
Write a short description of why the valley is special
Share your findings with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand biodiversity and natural beauty of the Valley of Flowers
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Living Root Bridges Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the traditional engineering techniques used by indigenous communities
steps: Read the paragraph about Living Root Bridges in Meghalaya
Note how the bridges are created using tree roots
Discuss why these bridges are useful during monsoons
Write a short paragraph explaining this unique construction
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students appreciate indigenous knowledge and sustainable engineering
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of explanation and understanding of concept (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Activity – Locate the Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Improve geographical awareness of India’s natural wonders
steps: Locate Uttarakhand on the map and mark the Valley of Flowers
Locate Meghalaya and mark the Living Root Bridges
Label the locations neatly
Discuss how geography influences these wonders
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to connect geographical locations with natural landmarks
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct labeling and neatness of map work (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Understand new vocabulary used in the chapter
steps: Identify words like 'mystifying', 'spectacle', and 'exotic'
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use each word in your own sentence
Share your sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and language skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Discussion – Wonders of Nature
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to express opinions about natural beauty
steps: Discuss with your partner which natural wonder you find most impressive
Explain why it amazes you
Write a few sentences about your choice
Present your ideas to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop speaking and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of ideas and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Poster Making – Protect Natural Wonders
steps: Choose a natural wonder mentioned in the chapter
Create a poster highlighting its beauty and importance
Include a slogan promoting conservation
Display the poster in the classroom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the importance of protecting natural heritage
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, message clarity, and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Short Informative Paragraph Writing
steps: Choose one wonder from the chapter
Write a paragraph describing its features
Include details about its location and importance
Edit your paragraph for grammar and clarity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve descriptive and informational writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Content accuracy, grammar, and structure (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Research Project – Wonders Around the World
steps: Choose a natural wonder from any part of the world
Collect information about its location and unique features
Write a short report or prepare a presentation
Present your findings to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students broaden their knowledge of global natural wonders
activities_projects.evaluation: Research quality, presentation, and accuracy (10 marks)
